Based on my analysis of the word indices and the text structure, I can now construct the complete classification. This text consists of two editorial introductions (مقدمة الطبعة الثانية and مقدمة الطبعة الأولى) by the editor محمد محيي الدين عبد الحميد to his edition of Ibn Aqil's Sharh of Ibn Malik's Alfiyyah.
